name: delegated-execution-client
description: Buyer, seller, and ops client runtime for delegated execution.

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:unit: vitest run --config tests/config/vitest.unit.config.mjs tests/unit/buyer-core-logic.test.js tests/unit/executors.test.js tests/unit/local-transport.test.js tests/unit/ops-console.dom.test.js tests/unit/runtime-utils.test.js
